title: hyoseris lucida
intro: Hyoseris lucida, also known as shining forget-me-not, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Hyoseris lucida include its use as a laxative and expectorant, with the plant's seeds and leaves being rich in saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Hyoseris lucida include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a digestive aid to relieve constipation and other gastrointestinal issues. Hyoseris lucida can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves and seeds in hot water, or it can be used as a tincture or dried extract for its medicinal properties.
